summary: Frontend-only smoke + content verification for portfolio update (Lahori Zeera 5th case study, Delhi relocation, Moxie problems/solution Roburae block, graphic poster gallery tiles + L-swatch identity tile, devanshibalyan@gmail.com email, LinkedIn removed, em-dashes purged, Archivo Black + Caveat fonts added). All 15 review_request checks PASS. 0 console errors, 0 page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: All updates render correctly with no console errors. Computed font-family on .font-poster = 'Archivo Black, Outfit, sans-serif' and on .font-script = 'Caveat, cursive', confirming the new fonts loaded successfully.
Moxie Beauty image is now a Curology skincare bottle (https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556228720-195a672e8a03) — correctly NOT a person.
Gallery tile count = 14 (up from 9 in iteration 1) — PORTFOLIO.galleryTile(i) numbering still works, but main agent should note any external automation that hardcoded i=0..8 will need to update.

Contact section linkedin testid still exists in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/portfolio.js (PORTFOLIO.contactLinkedin) even though the UI row was removed. This is harmless dead code; safe to leave or delete in a future cleanup.
Footer renders correctly via CSS text-transform: uppercase, so inner_text returns 'DESIGNED & WRITTEN BY DEVANSHI · DELHI' (the source string in Footer.js uses the correct case).
Gallery 'beats $10B.' source has capital B but renders as 'beats $10b.' due to lowercase styling on .font-poster — visually matches the spec's '₹10 beats $10b.' so this is intentional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio at https://pmm-portfolio-2.preview.emergentagent.com. test-ids do NOT use 'portfolio-' prefix; refer to /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/portfolio.js (hero-section, work-section, work-case-{slug}, gallery-section, gallery-tile-{i} for i=0..13, contact-section, contact-email-link, contact-cv-link). Many labels use CSS text-transform:uppercase so inner_text returns ALL CAPS — use case-insensitive checks when validating strings like 'Delhi · Remote', '05 case studies', 'Challenge/Insight/Strategy/Result', 'Identity board'. .font-poster computed font-family is 'Archivo Black' and .font-script is 'Caveat'.

verified_checks.lahori_zeera_headline: The ₹10 strategy that beat global cola giants.
